form.formComment: Has been in tremendous form, putting three wins together. Last start won by half a length at this track (22.59) beating Sunset Estrella in a Grade 5 on February 27. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.95) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and three places from six starts. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.
